meta.importedFrom: Unit 6 Passage 2 Exploring the unexplored（互动课文教学动画）英语新教材外研版七年级下册.html

article.title: Exploring the unexplored
article.summary: 从徐霞客的行走人生，理解探索未知的勇气与价值。

sentences.text: In 1640, a man was seriously ill.
sentences.tr: 1640年，一个男人病得很重。
sentences.d: 'In 1640'是时间状语。'was seriously ill'是系表结构，seriously修饰形容词ill。

sentences.text: He had to end the last trip of his life.
sentences.tr: 他不得不结束他生命中的最后一次旅行。
sentences.g: 主语 + 情态动词 + 谓语 + 宾语
sentences.d: 'had to'不得不，表示客观需要。'the last trip of his life'作宾语。

sentences.text: Back home, people asked him, “You spent your whole life on the road. Do you regret it?”
sentences.tr: 回到家后，人们问他：“你把一生都花在了路上。你后悔吗？”
sentences.d: 'spend time on sth'花费时间在某事上。'regret'后悔。

sentences.text: “I walked through many fantastic places in China,” he replied.
sentences.tr: “我走遍了中国许多奇妙的地方，”他回答道。
sentences.d: 'walk through'走过，穿越。'fantastic'极好的。

sentences.text: “People say I’m as great as Zhang Qian and Xuanzang.
sentences.tr: “人们说我和张骞、玄奘一样伟大。
sentences.g: 宾语从句 + 同级比较
sentences.d: 'as great as'像...一样伟大，同级比较结构。

sentences.text: So I have no regrets at all.”
sentences.tr: 所以我一点也不后悔。”
sentences.d: 'have no regrets'没有遗憾。'at all'根本，完全。

sentences.text: This man was Xu Xiake, the greatest traveller in Chinese history.
sentences.tr: 这个人就是徐霞客，中国历史上最伟大的旅行家。
sentences.d: 'the greatest traveller...'是Xu Xiake的同位语，对其进行补充说明。

sentences.text: From an early age, Xu dreamed of visiting China’s seas and mountains.
sentences.tr: 徐霞客从小就梦想着游览中国的名山大川。
sentences.d: 'dream of doing sth'梦想做某事。'seas and mountains'指山水。

sentences.text: But at the time, it was very difficult to travel far.
sentences.tr: 但在当时，出远门是非常困难的。
sentences.d: 'it'是形式主语，真正的主语是后面的不定式'to travel far'。

sentences.text: This didn’t stop him, however.
sentences.tr: 然而，这并没有阻止他。
sentences.d: 'however'作为插入语，表示转折。

sentences.text: At 22, he set out on his life’s journey.
sentences.tr: 22岁时，他踏上了他的人生旅程。
sentences.d: 'set out'出发，开始旅程。

sentences.text: He travelled for about 30 years, and achieved his dream.
sentences.tr: 他游历了大约30年，实现了他的梦想。
sentences.d: 'travelled'和'achieved'是并列的过去式动词。

sentences.text: Xu made many geographical discoveries during his journey.
sentences.tr: 徐霞客在旅途中有了许多地理发现。
sentences.d: 'make discoveries'做出发现。'geographical'地理的。

sentences.text: Once, he visited Mount Huangshan.
sentences.tr: 有一次，他游览了黄山。
sentences.d: 'Once'曾经，有一次。

sentences.text: People then thought Tiandu Peak was higher than Lianhua Peak.
sentences.tr: 当时人们认为天都峰比莲花峰高。
sentences.d: 'thought'后接省略that的宾语从句。'higher than'比较级。

sentences.text: To find out the truth, Xu climbed both peaks.
sentences.tr: 为了找出真相，徐霞客攀登了两座山峰。
sentences.d: 不定式'To find out...'作目的状语。

sentences.text: He discovered that Lianhua Peak gave a wider view, so it must be higher.
sentences.tr: 他发现莲花峰视野更开阔，所以它一定更高。
sentences.g: 宾语从句 + 结果状语从句
sentences.d: 'must be'表示肯定的推测。

sentences.text: He was right!
sentences.tr: 他是对的！
sentences.d: 简单的主系表结构。

sentences.text: Xu recorded his travel experiences in his diary.
sentences.tr: 徐霞客在日记中记录了他的旅行经历。
sentences.d: 'record'记录。'diary'日记。

sentences.text: This later became Xu Xiake’s Travel Notes.
sentences.tr: 这后来成为了《徐霞客游记》。
sentences.d: 'became'系动词，后接表语。

sentences.text: Thanks to this book, we can learn about China almost 400 years ago.
sentences.tr: 多亏了这本书，我们可以了解近400年前的中国。
sentences.d: 'Thanks to'多亏，由于。'learn about'了解。

sentences.text: “Exploring the unexplored” is the best description of Xu’s life.
sentences.tr: “探索未知”是徐霞客一生的最佳写照。
sentences.d: 'Exploring the unexplored'动名词短语作主语。

readingQuestions.stem: Why did Xu Xiake have no regrets about his life? (Detail)
options: A. Because he was very rich.
B. Because he visited many fantastic places.
C. Because he wrote a famous book.
D. Because he lived a long life.
readingQuestions.answer: B. Because he visited many fantastic places.
readingQuestions.rationaleZh: 细节理解题。文章中徐霞客回答说：'I walked through many fantastic places in China... So I have no regrets at all.'

readingQuestions.stem: What does the underlined word 'set out' mean in Paragraph 3? (Vocabulary)
options: A. To start a journey.
B. To write a book.
C. To climb a mountain.
D. To go back home.
readingQuestions.rationaleZh: 词义猜测题。根据语境'At 22, he set out on his life’s journey'，他在22岁开始了他的人生旅程。

readingQuestions.stem: Why did Xu climb both Tiandu Peak and Lianhua Peak? (Detail)
options: A. To exercise his body.
B. To enjoy the view.
C. To find out which one was higher.
D. To meet his friends.
readingQuestions.answer: C. To find out which one was higher.
readingQuestions.rationaleZh: 细节理解题。文章提到'To find out the truth (about which peak was higher), Xu climbed both peaks.'

readingQuestions.stem: What can we infer about Xu Xiake from the passage? (Inference)
options: A. He was afraid of difficulties.
B. He liked to stay at home.
C. He was brave and loved exploring.
D. He didn't like writing diaries.
readingQuestions.answer: C. He was brave and loved exploring.
readingQuestions.rationaleZh: 推理判断题。徐霞客克服困难远游，攀登高峰探求真相，说明他勇敢且热爱探索。

readingQuestions.stem: What is the best title for this passage? (Main Idea)
options: A. The History of Mount Huangshan.
B. A Famous Book about China.
C. Xu Xiake: The Greatest Traveller.
D. How to Travel in Ancient China.
readingQuestions.answer: C. Xu Xiake: The Greatest Traveller.
readingQuestions.rationaleZh: 主旨大意题。文章主要介绍了徐霞客的生平、旅行经历和成就，他是中国历史上最伟大的旅行家。
